intent: secure a working build of the release artifact, honoring the single ranked soft constraint 'prefer the in-house native build pipeline over an external alternative build service'
notes: Five DISTINCT sibling methods (attempt-a..attempt-e) under one parent decision 'use the in-house native pipeline' each tombstone. Per the skill's upstream-jump heuristic (K=5), after 5 sibling tombstones the planner must stop trying siblings, climb to the parent decision, and RELAX the soft constraint 'prefer in-house' to take the external ALTERNATIVE path, which then progresses to success. Side-effect-free: every outcome comes from a rule or the tombstone default; no rule runs a real action. LABELING CONTRACT for the run: label the five sibling attempts 'attempt-a'..'attempt-e' (collectively 'sibling' / 'method'); reserve the words 'relax', 'upstream', and 'alternative' EXCLUSIVELY for the post-K upstream-jump move so the progress rules fire only there. Progress rules are ordered after the five specific sibling rules and before the generic 'method' tombstone so the relaxed path always wins.

rules.reason: native build config A fails: toolchain mismatch
native build config B fails: missing in-house dependency
native build config C fails: incompatible compiler flags
native build config D fails: pipeline cache corrupt
native build config E fails: in-house runner offline
another in-house sibling config fails the same way
relaxed soft constraint 'prefer in-house'; the external alternative becomes admissible
upstream jump: parent decision 'use in-house pipeline' is the suspect; climb and re-chart
external alternative build service produces the artifact
yet another in-house method fails the same way
release artifact built and verified; intent satisfied
